title: Cuneiform Tablet #0438: Middle Assyrian Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
